title: Allocation
description: An expense allocation that distributes an expense amount across cost centers, departments, or general ledger accounts.

expenseId.description: The expense this allocation belongs to

overLimitAccountCode.description: Account code for amounts exceeding policy limits

percentage.description: The percentage of the total expense allocated (0-100)

isSystemAllocation.description: Whether this allocation was automatically created by the system (true) or manually created by a user (false)

isPercentEdited.description: Whether the allocation percentage has been modified

customData.description: Custom field values on the allocation
